actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page

actions.instruction: Open the Inactive filter tab to show deactivated extensions
actions.description: Click the Inactive filter tab to show deactivated extensions

actions.instruction: Wait until an element with selector `.inactive-extension-card` is visible
actions.description: Wait until an element with selector .inactive-extension-card is visible

actions.instruction: Click the first "Remove" button shown in the inactive extensions list
actions.description: Click the first 'Remove' button shown in the inactive extensions list
Click the confirm/primary button in the visible modal dialog

actions.instruction: Observe the action tag changes to "Uninstalling..."
actions.description: Take a screenshot to observe the action tag changes to 'Uninstalling...'

actions.instruction: Wait for the success toast "Extension uninstalled successfully"
actions.description: Wait for success toast indicating the extension has been uninstalled successfully.

actions.instruction: Verify the extension card is no longer visible in the grid
actions.description: Verify the extension card is NOT present or visible on the page
